title: [IOS] Location Sharing Dialogue - Don't Allow - Cancel
scenario: User declines location sharing during onboarding, then cancels the permission dialog when trying to use "Find My Device" from the hamburger menu, and is navigated back to the Poly Lens Menu screen.
steps: User selects "Don't Allow" during the Location Sharing dialogue in onboarding
A permission dialog appears with "Cancel" and "Enable Now" options
expected: User is navigated back to the Poly Lens Menu screen.
